meaning: (Knight 或 Dame)Grand Cross (of the Order)of the British Empire,(获)英帝国大十字勋章(的爵士或女爵士)
examples: EEG: The EEG of normal saline control group and GBE control group was normal.
AIM: To study the protective effects of CO GBE on multi infarction dementia (MID) rat model.
Objective:To probe into the effect of gingko biloba extract (GBE) on the rat immunity function.
Other recipients of doctorates were Dame Rosalyn Higgins, DBE, The Rt Hon Lord Rothschild, GBE, Dr Arno Penzias, and Professor Shirley Tilghman.
One was Ronald Reagan GCB and the other Caspar Weinberger GBE.
